description: make sure the dynamic renderer applies the random size variation to an asset spawned at a grid point. each asset of the same type should have a different size if size variation percent value for that asset is not 0.
the layer in front behind light application difference is too strong. the difference between in front and behind lighting to mask should have an adjustable value in camera settings.
changing a method of spawning for a spawn group in room editor causes the game to crash. make sure all the mouse controlls for all the spawn methods work as intended and dont cause a crash
